classification.description: Deed of rent deposit supplemental to a lease dated 29TH may 1987 relating to 24 blacklands way abingdon business park oxfordshire

particulars.description: All monies standing to the credit of an interest bearing account opened in the name of hte standard life assurance company with a bank or other institution of the standard life assurance company's choosing or other such account or fund on the money market as the standard life assurance company in its absolute descretion may select in accordance with a deed of rent deposit dated 11 may 2001.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee pursuant to the lease of even date

particulars.description: All monies from time to time standing to the credit of an interest bearing account opened in the name of the chargee with a bank or other institution of the chargee's choosing or such other account or fund on the money market as the standard life assurance company in its absolute discretion may select in accordance with a deed of rent deposit dated 11TH may 2001 and made between the chargee and the company wherein is held the deposit balance.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee payable pursuant to the lease or any expense incurred

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: Dem 4,000,000 (four million deutsche marks) due from the company to the chargee

particulars.description: A specific equitable charge over all freehold and leasehold properties and/or the proceeds of sale thereof fixed and floating charges over undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts and the benefits of any licences.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
